title: Verify successful user registration and email verification flow
description: Test the end-to-end happy path for a new user creating an account, receiving a verification email, and activating their account by clicking the link.
preconditions: User has a valid, unused email address
User is on the registration page

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid, unique email address
2. Enter a password that meets all security criteria (e.g., 'ValidPass1!')
5. Check the email inbox for a verification email
6. Click the verification link within the email
7. Attempt to log in with the newly created credentials

expected_result: User account is created, a success message is shown, the verification email is received, the account is activated upon clicking the link, and the user can successfully log in.
